query: We need to create a travel plan for 2 people departing from Lake Charles and visiting 2 cities in Texas. The trip will last for 5 days, starting from March 4th to March 8th, 2022. The budget is set at $4,600. In terms of accommodations, we prefer places where parties are allowed.

plan.attraction: Downtown Aquarium; Space Center Houston; Water Wall; Houston Museum of Natural Science; Houston Zoo; The Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Hermann Park; Houston Arboretum & Nature Center; Bayou Bend Collection and Gardens, Museum of Fine Arts, Houston; Market Square Park; Discovery Green; Smither Park; Children's Museum Houston; Holocaust Museum Houston; Sam Houston Park; Houston Legendary Graffiti Building; Gerald D. Hines Waterwall Park; Beer Can House; American Statesmanship Park; Pioneer Memorial Obelisk;
